allow: Bash(sips -g pixelHeight -g pixelWidth "/Users/twain/LBU/Makto Data/Merk/merk big logo.png")

Bash(# Favicon: copy original + create ico
cp "/Users/twain/LBU/Makto Data/Merk/merk-favicon-new.png" "/Users/twain/LBU/Makto Data/Merk/merk-analytics/public/favicon-96x96.png"
cp "/Users/twain/LBU/Makto Data/Merk/merk-favicon-new.png" "/Users/twain/LBU/Makto Data/Merk/merk-analytics/public/apple-touch-icon.png"

# Create .ico from the PNG \(multiple sizes\)
sips -z 48 48 "/Users/twain/LBU/Makto Data/Merk/merk-favicon-new.png" --out "/tmp/favicon-48.png" 2>/dev/null
sips -z 32 32 "/Users/twain/LBU/Makto Data/Merk/merk-favicon-new.png" --out "/tmp/favicon-32.png" 2>/dev/null
sips -z 16 16 "/Users/twain/LBU/Makto Data/Merk/merk-favicon-new.png" --out "/tmp/favicon-16.png" 2>/dev/null

# Use the 32x32 as favicon.ico \(browsers handle PNG in .ico\)
cp "/tmp/favicon-32.png" "/Users/twain/LBU/Makto Data/Merk/merk-analytics/app/favicon.ico"

# Logo: copy to public
cp "/Users/twain/LBU/Makto Data/Merk/merk big logo.png" "/Users/twain/LBU/Makto Data/Merk/merk-analytics/public/merk-white.png"

echo "Done")

Bash(# Favicon: use PNG directly as icon.png \(Next.js supports this\)
cp "/Users/twain/LBU/Makto Data/Merk/merk-favicon-new.png" "/Users/twain/LBU/Makto Data/Merk/merk-analytics/app/icon.png"
# Remove old favicon files that might interfere
rm -f "/Users/twain/LBU/Makto Data/Merk/merk-analytics/app/favicon.ico"
rm -f "/Users/twain/LBU/Makto Data/Merk/merk-analytics/app/icon.svg"
echo "Done")
